results.requirement:
TASK: Turn a client's raw, messy-background product photo into a pure-white-background marketplace catalog image and convert their rough hand-drawn logo sketch into a clean, brand-colored, scalable vector logo — then package everything for delivery.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A phone photograph of a rough hand-inked logo sketch on a piece of slightly off-white textured paper. The mark is a hand-drawn botanical emblem: a simple single sprig of laurel/olive leaves curving into a small circle, drawn in dark grey-black ballpoint/fineliner ink with visible imperfect line weight, a couple of stray pencil guide lines, and the hand-lettered words 'AURELIA BOTANICALS' beneath it in rough capitals. The paper is photographed at a slight angle under indoor lighting with a faint shadow in one corner and a subtly uneven grey-ish cast (not pure white paper). Visible paper grain and tiny smudges. No digital cleanup, looks like a real founder's napkin-style sketch.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Grey-ish ink on off-white paper with stray guide lines and uneven lighting is what makes vectorize + color-overlay meaningful. The wordmark text must be legible enough to motivate the font_recommend pairing step. Use gemini-3-pro-image because the sketch carries hand-lettered text/logo.

panel.summary: Convincing real-looking hand-inked laurel logo sketch with fully legible 'AURELIA BOTANICALS' wordmark, intended imperfections only — no AI glitches detected.
No genuine AI-generation or production-breaking defects detected; the asset matches the intended raw hand-drawn logo sketch photo.
This asset is a flawless representation of a raw client sketch, ready for the next stage of production.
Flawless execution matching intended raw sketch with no AI artifacts.

results.requirement:
TASK: Turn a client's raw, messy-background product photo into a pure-white-background marketplace catalog image and convert their rough hand-drawn logo sketch into a clean, brand-colored, scalable vector logo — then package everything for delivery.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A real amateur smartphone product photo, NOT studio quality: a single amber-glass cosmetic serum bottle with a black dropper cap, standing on a cluttered scratched wooden kitchen table, shot handheld under soft directional window light coming from the left. The shot is slightly tilted (~4 degrees off level so the table edge runs on a diagonal). Background is messy and distracting: a crumpled tea towel, a coffee mug, and a power cord are visible behind the bottle. There are blown-out specular hot spots and a bright reflection on the curved amber glass from the window. Visible dust on the table, real surface texture, true-to-life imperfect exposure, candid documentary phone-camera look, slight handheld softness. 24-megapixel, 4:3, no text overlays, no logo on the bottle label legible.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like a genuine bad-lighting phone snap on a real cluttered surface — tilted, messy background, real specular blowout on the glass — so that auto-straighten, background removal, white-fill, highlight recovery and tone correction all have something real to fix. No CGI gloss, real wood grain and dust.

results.requirement:
TASK: Turn the client's raw studio shot of a modern silver rosary necklace into a full commercial product package: a retouched hero image on a clean sweep, a vector line-art spec, a screen-print-style halftone tech graphic, a print-ready data-merged spec-sheet PDF and a rendered wholesale line-sheet card — all silver-true and ready for revision rounds.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photorealistic amateur jewelry bench studio photograph of a MODERN sterling silver rosary necklace lying on a slightly cluttered grey workbench under mixed warm-and-cool lighting. The rosary has clean geometric oval links, small minimal smooth beads, and a flat minimalist modern crucifix — brushed/satin silver finish, not high-polish. Shot slightly tilted/crooked, mild yellow color cast from a desk lamp, real metal micro-scratches and fingerprints, faint dust, shallow but imperfect focus, candid documentary product-shot look, NOT a clean ecommerce render, NOT CGI-glossy. 4000x3000px.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Deliberately imperfect: crooked horizon (needs auto_straighten), warm color cast (needs color_temperature/auto_tone), real scratches/fingerprints and a messy bench background (needs subject isolation + clean sweep). This is the raw client capture, not a finished shot.

defects.description: Rosary bead spacing/link pattern is slightly irregular — beads sit at inconsistent intervals and a couple of oval links vary in size, which is plausible for a handmade bench piece but borders on AI link-count inconsistency; acceptable for a raw capture.

defects.location: connector disc below the chain junction (center)
defects.description: The flat round connector medallion where the pendant drop meets the decade chain looks slightly ambiguous in how the links attach, but not broken.

panel.summary: Convincing photoreal raw bench capture of a modern satin-silver rosary that nails the brief; only trivially irregular bead/link spacing keeps it from perfect, and all flagged 'flaws' (tilt, cast, scratches, mess) are intentional.

Composition is square with large empty workbench area and cropped/partial bench tools, rather than a 4:3 amateur studio photograph as specified.

results.requirement:
TASK: From the industrial designer's raster pendant sketch and two mixed-lighting workbench photos of a stainless-steel sample pendant and chain, produce a clean factory-ready vector spec asset plus retouched, isolated, color-accurate catalog hero shots (one expanded to a catalog canvas, one duotone print-screen variant) as a coordinated set for the design team.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat 2D technical line-art drawing of a men's pendant, front elevation: a rounded-square stainless-steel pendant roughly 30mm tall with a soldered top bail loop, clean black ink outlines on white, fine interior engraving lines suggesting a compass-rose motif, thin dimension tick marks at the edges. Rendered as a slightly low-contrast flatbed SCAN export to PNG — faint paper texture, the whole drawing rotated about 4 degrees clockwise (skewed), a little extra white margin around it. No color, no shading, no 3D, pure black-on-white draftsman line work.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like a raster PNG export of an Illustrator/scanned sketch, NOT a clean vector: visible slight rotation/skew, faint paper grain, anti-aliased (not razor-crisp) ink edges, so that auto_straighten + crop_to_bounds + vectorize have real work to do.

defects.description: The eight-point compass star is slightly asymmetric — the diagonal secondary points are uneven in length and the intersection is a touch off-center, typical of hand sketch but not a fatal geometry break.
Lettering is hand-drawn and legible; the '3' has a slightly odd terminal but reads correctly as '30mm'. No garbling.

panel.summary: Clean, on-brief draftsman line drawing of a compass-rose pendant with correct '30mm' label, faint paper grain and intended ~4° skew — no genuine AI defects, just harmless hand-sketch asymmetry.
Clean scanned-style black line-art pendant spec matches the stated purpose with no visible AI glitches or production-breaking defects.
This asset is flawless and perfectly matches the 'scanned sketch' specification, ready for the next stage.
Flawless technical line-art drawing matching all requirements.

Box-link chain on a busy bench justifies isolating it (select_by_prompt/remove_background) and applying the SAME temperature + tonal treatment derived from the pendant chain so the set reads consistent.

A few links show slightly inconsistent stacking/gap rhythm where the chain curves, but consistent with a real chain twisting on itself.

results.requirement:
TASK: Turn the brand's raw studio prototype shots, wordmark, and lifestyle frame into a launch image kit: a clean white-background e-commerce set, a color-graded close-up hero, an expanded social banner, a vectorized wordmark, and a licensed lifestyle backdrop for the social team.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photorealistic DSLR product photograph of a single elevated lifestyle-brand bracelet — braided dark navy waxed-cord band with a polished 18k-gold barrel clasp and a small engraved gold charm — lying on a plain light-grey seamless paper sweep, shot slightly tilted/crooked so the horizon line of the sweep is a few degrees off level. Soft single-source studio softbox light from upper left, gentle falloff, faint contact shadow under the bracelet. The grey background is slightly uneven and a touch dull/underexposed, NOT pure white. Real material detail: individual cord fibers and weave texture, fine brushed-then-polished metal with tiny realistic micro-scratches and accurate specular highlights on the gold, no CGI gloss. Eye-level macro, shallow-ish depth of field, candid commercial catalog feel. 3000x3000, high detail.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like an UN-retouched raw studio capture: deliberately a few degrees crooked, grey (not white) seamless, slightly dull/underexposed so auto-straighten, crop, auto-tone, exposure/contrast, warm WB and the select-subject→invert→fill-white background cleanup all have real work to do. Real cord weave + micro-scratched gold so single-color gold saturation boost and lens-blur macro detail read believably.

defects.location: gold barrel clasp, upper-left of full image / top-right crop
defects.description: The magnetic barrel clasp reads as two nested cylindrical segments with a slightly ambiguous join line; the seam between the two gold sections is a touch unclear but remains physically plausible for a magnetic clasp.
Engraved knot/logo motif on the gold charm is a simple abstract line mark, slightly soft but legible and consistent — no garbled text, acceptable at this DOF.

results.requirement:
TASK: Take my approved raster abstract logo concept and produce the full hand-off package — cleaned and brightened full-colour vector master (AI/SVG), a single-colour version, a single-colour print/screen variant, a wide social-header lockup, high-res PNG/JPEG exports, and a style note with hex/RGB values and recommended typography.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A single modern abstract brand logo mark centered on a plain pale-grey studio background, rendered as if exported from a concept design tool. The mark is a clean geometric abstract form — three overlapping rounded chevron/petal shapes fanning out, no letters, no literal objects, no realistic illustration. Bright energetic gradient palette: electric magenta into coral-orange into a vivid cyan accent. Slightly off-square framing with a few pixels of empty margin uneven on each side, a faint anti-aliased fringe / light halo at the shape edges against the grey, and a barely-perceptible 1.5-degree rotation so it is not perfectly level. Flat vector-style shading, crisp but with the subtle softness of a raster export, 2048x1900 px. No text, no wordmark, no drop shadow, no mockup, no hand, no background scene.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like a real approved concept hand-off render: a raster PNG (not already a clean vector), with genuine production defects the agent has to fix — slight rotation (drives auto_straighten), uneven margin (drives crop_to_bounds), edge fringe/halo against grey (drives remove_background), and slightly flat/dull colour before the vibrance+HSL pass. Abstract geometric only, so it honours the brief's 'no literal illustrations' and is legitimately vectorizable.

defects.location: center, where magenta chevron meets orange/cyan shapes
defects.description: The overlap geometry of the three shapes is slightly ambiguous — the orange and cyan petals read as fused near the top-right junction rather than as three cleanly distinct overlapping forms, but this is coherent and vectorizable, not a broken melt.

defects.location: all shape edges against grey background
defects.description: Light halo / anti-aliased white fringe around the mark — but this is explicitly an ON-PURPOSE production defect per the brief (drives remove_background), so not counted as a genuine failure.

panel.summary: Clean abstract three-part gradient chevron mark on pale grey with the intended fringe, slight tilt and dull-flat colour — all on-brief; only a faintly ambiguous shape-overlap junction keeps it from perfect, and it is fully usable.
No genuine AI-generation failures found; the asset matches the abstract logo brief with only the intended raster halo, slight rotation, and uneven margins.
This asset is a flawless execution of the client's concept, exactly matching the brief's specifications for a raw hand-off.
Flawless abstract logo asset matching all stated requirements and intended imperfections.

The badge is a ring containing the curved text 'Maple Ridge · HOME SERVICES · EST 2026' around a small centered maple-leaf mark, in muted terracotta and olive-sage on ivory. Slight off-center placement on the card, soft natural shadow, faint paper grain, photographed at a slight angle — a real printed badge proof, not a flat vector export.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Round mark on a square card with a gray tabletop margin → exercises remove_background + crop_to_bounds to a tight round crop. Text/logo-bearing → gemini-3-pro-image.

results.requirement:
TASK: Take the client's supplied OVERDRIVE raster logo lockup and productionize it into the full merch brand-kit deliverable set — transparent primary/stacked/icon/avatar PNGs, social-PFP crop, black/white/mono variants, a clean SVG vector source, an extracted palette reference, and font recommendations — chaining every step in Adobe.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Flat 2D vector-style brand logo lockup for a streetwear scholarship merch brand, the wordmark 'OVERDRIVE' in heavy bold all-caps condensed collegiate-athletic sans-serif, with a single clean minimal graduation cap (mortarboard with a short tassel) integrated above or beside the wordmark. Bold modern youthful premium-streetwear feel, NOT a government or university seal, NOT a lottery logo, NOT generic education clipart. Two-color: deep navy and a bright varsity gold. Rendered as a finished horizontal lockup centered on a plain flat light-gray studio background with even margins, crisp anti-aliased edges, no photographic texture, no drop shadow. High resolution, 2400x1400px.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like a delivered raster logo export (flat, even, gallery-style on a plain solid background) so background removal and vectorization have clean edges to work on. Text 'OVERDRIVE' must be legible and correctly spelled in all caps — this is why gemini-3-pro-image (text/logo-faithful) is used rather than a photoreal model. Keep it strictly two-color with hard edges; avoid gradients, glow, or 3D bevels that would muddy the vectorize step.

The leading 'O' is partially occluded by the cap, so at a glance the wordmark reads slightly ambiguous; spelling is correct (OVERDRIVE) and all letters legible on inspection.

results.requirement:
TASK: Restore three damaged old photo scans — correct color fading, conceal scratches/tears over plain areas, and maximize clarity — then output each as a print-ready A4 (2480x3508 px, 300 DPI) file.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): An authentic, heavily-aged scanned color studio portrait of a woman from the late 1960s, photographed straight-on as a flatbed scan. Strong overall yellow-orange color cast and faded, low-contrast tones typical of decayed C-print dye; muted, washed-out skin and fabric colors. Visible real photographic grain, soft focus, slight blur. The whole frame is very slightly tilted (about 2-3 degrees) as if placed crooked on a scanner, with a thin uneven white scan border and a faint dust speckle. Period-correct hair, makeup, clothing and studio lighting. Documentary realism, real pores and individual hair strands, no CGI gloss, no modern color.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as a genuine decayed 1968 C-print scan: yellow cast + flat faded contrast are the damage the chain must FIX, so do NOT pre-correct them. Keep the slight tilt and ragged white scan border for the straighten+crop steps to act on. Native grain so the later light-grain step blends naturally.

panel.summary: Convincing decayed 1968 C-print studio portrait scan with authentic yellow cast, grain, soft focus, tilt and ragged white border — all intended imperfections, no AI-generation failures detected.
This asset is a flawless execution of the brief, showing no signs of AI generation and perfectly emulating a damaged vintage photo scan.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): An authentic faded color outdoor snapshot from 1972 of two people standing in a park with a large expanse of plain pale-blue summer SKY filling the top third of the frame. PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal wide-angle interior photo of a modern rental living room shot handheld at 7am in natural light, slightly tilted horizon (about 2.5 degrees off level) with converging vertical wall lines, mixed white balance — warm tungsten lamp glow on the left wall and cool blue daylight flooding through a large window on the right, mild shadow underexposure in the corners, a faint grey scuff mark and small dust speck on the pale matte wall near the sofa, light grey sectional sofa, blonde-wood floor, minimalist decor, real documentary look with natural sensor grain, no CGI gloss.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like an un-edited estate-agent phone/mirrorless frame: real tilt, real converging verticals, genuine mixed-temperature lighting and a real wall scuff/dust mark so the straighten, temperature, shadow-lift and spot-fix steps have something authentic to correct. Keep candid, slightly imperfect, not staged-perfect.

defects.description: Minor visual ambiguity where the thin black table legs cross the rug pattern, but geometry remains plausible; no true fusion or melting.

panel.summary: A clean, photoreal candid interior that nails every intended imperfection (tilt, converging verticals, mixed white balance, wall scuff/dust) with no genuine AI defects worth rejecting.
No genuine AI-generation, geometry, text, artifact, or fidelity defects detected.
Flawless match to intended realism with no AI generation artifacts.
This is a flawless source image that perfectly matches the brief for a raw, unedited client photo with no signs of AI generation.

defects.description: Slightly soft/low-contrast, typical of a video still grab; background bokeh is heavy but plausible for shallow depth of field.
Handwriting/print in the open notebook is illegible squiggles, but it is far out of focus and could be genuine defocus rather than AI gibberish — non-critical.

panel.summary: A convincing candid video-still of a man speaking at a desk with no obvious AI failures; only minor softness and out-of-focus illegible text, both plausibly natural.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Flat 2D channel logo lockup on transparent background: the wordmark 'PRINCERRR' in a bold rounded geometric sans, lowercase tagline 'daily life, unfiltered' beneath, a small simple play-button glyph to the left, two flat brand colors (deep teal and warm coral), crisp clean edges, centered, no gradients, no photographic texture, 2048x1024 PNG with alpha.

results.requirement:
TASK: Vectorize and clean up HaulAway's existing raster logo to print-ready quality, then build the full set of brand variations (master vector, horizontal, stacked, icon-only HA mark, one-color knockouts, a lime-on-black trailer-wrap hero) plus a font + color-usage reference (typography pairing + black/lime/gray hex/CMYK/Pantone callouts) — all wrap/shirt/print ready.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat, slightly low-resolution company logo PNG for a junk-removal business called 'HaulAway'. A bold geometric 'HA' monogram mark in lime green (#9ACD32) and black sits above a clean sans-serif wordmark reading 'HaulAway' with a thin gray tagline 'HAULING • CLEANOUTS • DEMOLITION' beneath it. Black, lime-green and gray palette only. The whole logo is very slightly rotated about 2.5 degrees clockwise (as if scanned off a business card), set on an almost-white #F4F4F2 background with faint JPEG-style compression softness around the edges. Crisp readable type, no drop shadows, no gradients. Realistic flat-art logo file, not glossy 3D.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as a real client-supplied 'I only have this as a PNG' asset: mild compression softness, a true ~2.5° skew so auto_straighten has work to do, near-white (not pure-white) background so remove_background and a color cleanup are warranted, and crisp enough type that vectorize yields clean paths. Text must be legible so select_by_prompt can target the 'HaulAway' wordmark vs the 'HA' monogram.

defects.description: The H and A letterforms are fused/overlapping in a way that reads slightly ambiguously — the shared crossbar geometry is unconventional but intentional-looking for a monogram; acceptable but worth noting for clean vectorization.
Slight compression softness on type edges consistent with stated intended-realism note; not a genuine defect.

panel.summary: Clean, on-brand flat logo with correct 'HaulAway' spelling, legible tagline, and intentional compression/skew — no garbled text or broken anatomy, fully usable for vectorization.

results.requirement:
TASK: Take the client's AI-generated raster logo, clean and de-skew it, isolate the mark on transparency, trace it into a crisp scalable SVG, and derive a full multi-platform vector + raster export kit that stays high-quality at every size and format.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A 1024x1024 PNG of an AI-generated tech startup logo as it would look straight out of an image generator: a teal (#178C8C) and charcoal (#2B2F33) brand mark for 'Northwind Analytics' — a clean geometric icon of three stacked curved wind/data-flow lines to the LEFT of the wordmark text 'Northwind Analytics' in a modern semibold sans-serif. The logo sits centered on a faint off-white (#F4F2EE) softly textured paper-like card that fills the frame. Render it with the tell-tale traits of an AI raster export: very slightly soft anti-aliased edges, a faint amount of luminance noise across the background, mild uneven lighting, and the whole logo rotated about 2.5 degrees clockwise so the baseline is not perfectly level. Crisp readable text, accurate kerning, no extra glyphs, no watermark, sharp enough that the letterforms are legible. Photographic-flat, not glossy 3D.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must be a believable AI export, not a pre-cleaned vector: keep the off-white textured background (no transparency), the soft edges, the faint noise, and the ~2.5deg tilt — these are the exact defects the Adobe chain has to fix (auto_straighten, tonal cleanup, background flatten, isolate) before vectorizing. Text must be legible so the trace and the font_recommend step are meaningful. 8-bit RGB PNG, sRGB.

defects.description: Slightly tight/awkward kerning where 'th' meets 'w' but both words remain clearly legible as 'Northwind Analytics'; no garbled or extra glyphs.

TASK: From the client's raw chicken-bowl hero photo, raw 4K product-showcase footage, and flat logo PNG, produce a retouched website-banner hero still, a vertical + square + landscape cutdown set of the product-showcase video plus an AI sizzle cut, and a screen-print-ready vector logo.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal hand-held studio food photograph of a high-protein meal-prep chicken bowl: grilled sliced chicken breast, fluffy white rice, roasted broccoli, cherry tomatoes and a drizzle of sauce in a clear meal-prep container on a light wood table. Shot slightly tilted (horizon off by ~4 degrees), framed wider than needed with empty table around the bowl, mixed warm-and-cool lighting that looks slightly flat and under-saturated, real food texture, visible steam wisps, natural shadows, candid documentary feel, NOT glossy CGI, real grain. 4000x3000.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Deliberately imperfect: tilted, flat color, loose framing, mixed white balance — so the auto_straighten / crop / auto_tone / temperature / subject-pop / solid-canvas-fill chain all have real work to do.

defects.description: Food visible through the glass side wall (tomato/broccoli lower down) is smeared and indistinct, typical of AI refraction guesswork; acceptable at hero distance.
No visible steam wisps despite purpose calling for them; not a glitch but a minor fidelity miss.
Image reads slightly cleaner/more polished than the 'flat, under-saturated, candid documentary, real grain' brief; grain is minimal, but well within usable raw-input range.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat, top-down (bird's-eye) orthographic render of a 4-way road junction on neutral mid-gray asphalt, clean vector-illustration style with crisp white lane markings, yellow center lines, white stop bars and pedestrian crossings, two generic top-down cars (one silver sedan, one dark hatchback) sitting in lanes, no text, no UI, no shadows baked into background, even flat lighting, 1024x1024, the kind of clean reference still a motion-graphics artist would trace for a driving-education explainer. INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like a real flat AE/Illustrator reference frame: pure top-down, no perspective, no drop shadows on the asphalt, lane paint slightly worn so the grade has something to work on. The junction is centered so a 9:16 crop of the 1024x1024 square keeps the intersection framed.

defects.location: central intersection box, all four inner corners
defects.description: The central asphalt square is rendered a distinctly lighter gray than the surrounding roadway with a hard visible seam/outline along all four edges, producing a floating cut-out box look rather than continuous asphalt — an obvious tonal mismatch a client will notice.
Yellow center line on the northern approach abruptly terminates just above the stop bar and does not visually continue/connect consistently with the other arms' center lines through the junction.

defects.location: top-right quadrant faint smudges near junction edge

results.requirement:
TASK: From the approved folk-art 20th-Anniversary master, produce a print-ready 5-screen separation pack (white underbase + four spot-colour halftone plates with a dot-gain choke), a vectorized hard-edge lettering/line plate, a grain-textured client proof, and the registration/separation sheet rendered out of the supplied Illustrator template (PDF and SVG as two separate render passes).
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A handcrafted folk-art / festival-poster style illustration celebrating a classical Christian school's 20th anniversary, portrait orientation roughly 2:3, on a cream paper ground. A dense narrative composition weaving small vignettes: a chapel with a cross, students in uniform reading books, an oak-lined quad, a schoolhouse facade, a choir, families at a community feast, scrolls and laurels, a banner reading 'BAYOU CROSS CLASSICAL ACADEMY' across the top and '20 YEARS - 2006-2026' along the bottom in clean serif lettering. Limited screen-print palette of deep Marian blue, antique gold, brick red and ink black on cream. Soft flat tonal shading inside the figures, hard-edge solid lettering. Slight hand-printed registration imperfection, visible paper texture, individual line-work strokes — looks like a real handmade screen-print poster, never CGI-glossy. Flattened, full-bleed, high resolution.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): gemini-3-pro-image chosen because the deliverable hinges on legible, correctly-spelled commemorative TITLE and YEAR lettering plus a logo-like banner — its strength. Must look like a finalized, approved flat illustration (the client's sign-off artwork), with genuine paper tooth and limited spot-ink palette so the halftone/separation steps have real soft-tone passages AND hard-edge lettering to separate. No photographic depth, no gradients deeper than flat screen-print shading. Client and banner text are the fictional 'Bayou Cross Classical Academy' — no real school, denomination-figure, or person is depicted.

defects.description: Text is fully legible and correctly spelled, but the em-dash between '20 YEARS' and the year range renders as a thin isolated hyphen with awkward spacing; acceptable for folk-art style but slightly loose kerning.

results.requirement:
TASK: Take my supplied Tamil banner master files plus hero photography and brand logo, and produce the complete print-ready production package — graded hero image with print bleed, a clean vector logo, a traditional halftone texture motif, and CMYK 150-dpi PDF/JPEG exports of all six large-format banners — with editable source files alongside.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal wide horizontal photograph of a traditional South Indian service storefront / festive premises scene at golden hour: warm sunlight, marigold garlands, brass lamps, a draped maroon-and-gold cloth backdrop, a small decorated counter or seva table in the foreground. On the wall behind the counter hangs the business signboard carrying the SAME brand as brand_logo_flat.png: the circular maroon-and-gold crest (a brass oil-lamp / kuthuvilakku in the centre, the Tamil-script business name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' curved along the top arc, a small lotus underline) shown together with the Tamil business name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை'. That Tamil name is the ONLY brand name anywhere in the frame — no other business name, no English or romanised wordmark on the board. Slightly tilted handheld framing (visibly off-level horizon by ~3 degrees), mildly overexposed sky in the top-right corner, real documentary look — natural skin pores on a person partially in frame, individual marigold petals, dust motes in the light, no CGI gloss. 3:1 ultra-wide aspect, high resolution.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Deliberately tilted horizon and one blown-highlight region so straighten / highlight-recovery / auto-tone steps have real work to do. Warm festive palette gives the gold/maroon grade something genuine to push. Must look like a real phone/DSLR capture, not a render. Signboard MUST carry the ONE canonical brand — the same circular kuthuvilakku crest and the Tamil name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' as on brand_logo_flat.png — so the hero photo and the logo agree on a single brand identity (name, mark, and maroon/gold palette). No 'SRI LAKSHMI SEVA NILAYAM' or any other name.

results.requirement:
TASK: Take my supplied Tamil banner master files plus hero photography and brand logo, and produce the complete print-ready production package — graded hero image with print bleed, a clean vector logo, a traditional halftone texture motif, and CMYK 150-dpi PDF/JPEG exports of all six large-format banners — with editable source files alongside.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat, slightly low-resolution raster brand logo for a traditional Tamil service business: a circular emblem with a stylised oil-lamp (kuthuvilakku) motif, the Tamil-script business name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' curved along the top arc, and a small lotus underline, in solid maroon and gold on a plain white background. 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' is the one and only brand name — no English or romanised wordmark. Crisp solid color fills, no gradients, no photographic texture — the kind of logo that would vectorize cleanly. Render at modest resolution so visible pixel/edge stair-stepping is present.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Solid-fill, limited-palette emblem is the correct candidate for image_vectorize (raster->clean SVG). Mild aliasing makes the vectorize step a genuine cleanup, not a no-op. Tamil glyphs are baked into the raster (we never re-typeset). This crest — circular kuthuvilakku emblem + Tamil name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' + lotus underline in maroon/gold — is the CANONICAL master mark; every other brand-carrying asset (e.g. the hero signboard, the banner masters, last year's proof) must show this same name, mark and palette.

defects.description: The curved Tamil script does not correctly read 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை'. The opening cluster renders as 'பாரம்பரிய' with malformed/merged glyphs — the 'ம்ப' region shows a distorted character and inconsistent letterforms; the leading glyph reads more like 'பாரம்பரிய' with a corrupted ரி/ரி ligature. Several conjuncts are garbled rather than clean, native Tamil orthography.

results.requirement:
TASK: Clean up the club's phone photo of a stitched sample crest, vectorize the emblem into razor-sharp scalable art at 3-6 inch patch size, reduce it to flat spot-color separations, and hand back a factory-ready SVG plus exported vector masters.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A real hand-held phone photo of a single embroidered football-club crest patch lying flat on a wooden table. The patch is a shield/heraldic shield shape with a stylized mountain-ridge silhouette across the top, a small football (soccer ball) in the center, the bold uppercase letters 'RRFC' beneath it, and a banner ribbon at the bottom reading 'EST. 2014'. It is stitched in exactly four thread colors: forest green, cream, slate grey, and a black outline, on a heathered grey-green fabric backing, with a slightly raised satin-stitch merrowed border. The photo is slightly tilted about 3 degrees clockwise, dull and mildly underexposed with soft indoor lighting, a faint cool green color cast, and the woven twill thread texture is clearly visible across every color so the edges look soft and fuzzy rather than crisp. Documentary, true-to-life phone-camera realism, real thread sheen and fabric weave, no CGI gloss, no studio lighting. 2400x2400.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as an actual phone photo of a real stitched sample: visible satin/twill thread texture across every fill, a raised merrowed border, mild ~3 degree keystone tilt, dull underexposure and a green fabric cast — so auto_straighten / auto_tone / temperature-neutralize / contrast-crush all have genuine work to do before a clean trace is possible. The four thread colors must be distinct and the RRFC / EST. 2014 lettering legible so select_by_prompt can target each color region and the vectorize yields clean glyph and shield paths. gemini-3-pro-image chosen for legible embedded lettering.

defects.description: 'EST. 2014' is legible and correctly spelled; slight stitch-thread fuzz on the '4' but consistent with real embroidery, not garbled.
Intended shallow-DOF softness on the phone and hand; the patch itself remains sharp enough for tracing — within stated realism.

panel.summary: A convincing, on-brief phone photo of a real embroidered RRFC crest with legible lettering, correct four-color palette and intended imperfections — no genuine AI defects, safe to vectorize.

defects.description: Image is delivered as a wide landscape frame rather than the stated 2400x2400 square asset, reducing suitability for the specified handoff format.
Camera angle is a low oblique tabletop perspective with noticeable keystone distortion, not merely a mild 3-degree clockwise phone-photo tilt as specified.
A blurred hand/phone-like object intrudes into the background, while the stated asset calls for a single crest patch lying on a wooden table.

panel.summary: The crest, stitching, soccer ball, and RRFC / EST. 2014 text are clean and believable, but the asset misses the required square delivery format and has stronger perspective distortion than specified.

results.requirement:
TASK: Clean and vectorize LUMIÈRE MÉNAGE's supplied flat monochrome logo concept into an editable SVG master, then assemble the full reversible variant system — black-on-white master, white-on-dark knockout, avatar/PFP crop, stacked lockup, one-color black print PNG, a mono-tint alt, a monochrome palette recipe, and a font recommendation — all scalable from avatar to signage.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat, high-contrast monochrome logo concept export for a modern clean-beauty skincare brand. A bold, minimal, geometric monogram mark resolving the letters 'L' and 'M' into a single symmetric abstract shape built from crisp straight lines and negative space (no illustration, no ornament, no flourishes) sits centered above a clean modern condensed sans-serif wordmark reading 'LUMIÈRE MÉNAGE' in all caps, with a thin small tagline 'CLEAN BEAUTY' beneath. Everything is pure black (#111111) on a near-white #F5F5F3 background — strictly one color, no gradients, no shading, no drop shadow, no color. The whole lockup is very slightly rotated about 2 degrees clockwise as if exported at a tilt, with faint compression softness at the edges. Crisp legible type, hard geometric edges, high resolution 2400x2000px.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as a real client-supplied 'approved concept, only have it as a flat PNG' hand-off: a genuine ~2 degree skew so auto_straighten has real work, an off-white (#F5F5F3) rather than pure-white background so remove_background + auto_tone are warranted, mild compression softness, and hard high-contrast geometric edges + legible type so image_vectorize yields clean monochrome paths and select_by_prompt / crop_to_bounds can target the monogram vs the wordmark. Strictly monochrome per the brief (no gradients/multicolor) so the vectorize and the reversed knockout stay clean. gemini-3-pro-image is chosen for faithful, correctly-spelled logo text over a photoreal model.

defects.description: The LM monogram is not cleanly resolved: overlapping strokes read as a chaotic, asymmetric jumble rather than a symmetric abstract shape. The brief specifies a bold, minimal, SYMMETRIC monogram, but the mark has ragged, uneven upper serrations and unbalanced left/right forms that do not resolve legibly into 'L' and 'M'.

Fails the 'symmetric abstract shape built from crisp straight lines and negative space' requirement — the mark is visually noisy and asymmetric, more like a tangled overlap than a clean geometric monogram, undermining scalability to avatar/signage as specified.
Text is correctly spelled with proper accents (È, É). Minor kerning looseness but nothing garbled; legible and brand-accurate.

panel.summary: Type is clean and correctly spelled, but the central LM monogram is asymmetric and visually tangled, failing the brief's demand for a crisp, symmetric geometric mark.

defects.description: Displayed asset appears square and substantially lower than the stated 2400x2000px deliverable requirement, limiting suitability as a master source for scalable client handoff.
Monogram is a clean geometric LM-style mark but does not read as strongly symmetric, despite the brief calling for a single symmetric abstract shape.

results.requirement:
TASK: Clean and de-skew Apexguard's three AI-drafted PPF/tint logo rasters, trace them into crisp production SVG masters, derive one-color knockouts for vinyl weeding, then assemble a multi-size die-cut vinyl decal/sticker sheet by binding the vector marks and the approved-sizes CSV into the client's authored cut-line template and exporting a press-ready PDF + SVG.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A 1500x1100 flat PNG of an AI-generated sub-brand mark: the wordmark 'APEXGUARD' with 'TINT' set smaller beneath it, next to a simple flat rectangular tint-bar glyph drawn as three discrete flat bands stepping from light grey to deep charcoal (NO smooth gradient — hard-edged flat bands only), representing a window-tint product line. Deep-blue (#123A6B) hairline frame around the bar, matte-black type. Minimal, no bevel, no 3D. Centered on a faint off-white (#F2F0EB) softly textured card filling the frame. AI-export tells: slightly soft edges, faint noise, mild uneven lighting, and the mark rotated about 2 degrees off-level. High-contrast flat art, crisp type, no watermark.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Second sub-brand for the tint line. The tint bar is authored as HARD-EDGED FLAT BANDS (not a smooth gradient) specifically so image_vectorize traces it cleanly into flat vector shapes and so it honors the brief's 'no heavy gradients' rule. Different tilt again for a distinct clean/trace pass. 8-bit sRGB PNG.

results.requirement:
TASK: Batch-retouch and colour-grade three raw studio headshot frames of one Northwind executive into a consistent set of fully-finished colour portraits, then produce clean black-and-white alternates and the LinkedIn / website / print-ready crops, delivered as a consistent print/web-ready set.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal un-retouched studio corporate headshot of a 44-year-old Black male executive, head-and-shoulders, in a charcoal suit and open-collar white shirt, shot against a seamless neutral light-grey paper backdrop with soft key + fill studio lighting. DELIBERATELY flat and slightly under-graded like a straight RAW camera JPEG export: low contrast, slightly cool/blue white balance from strobes, calm neutral-professional expression, natural skin with visible pores and a faint under-eye shadow, real individual hair strands, slightly dull teeth and eyes (un-retouched). Frame very slightly tilted ~2 degrees, faint sensor noise, 4000x5000 portrait orientation. Documentary realism, not CGI-glossy, no beauty retouching applied.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Frame 1 of a 3-frame session hand-off. Must look like an unedited studio capture (flat contrast, cool cast, real skin texture/pores, faint noise, slight tilt) so the grade/retouch chain has genuine work to do. Same subject, backdrop and wardrobe as frames 2-3 for cross-frame consistency.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Flat minimalist brand wordmark on a transparent background: the word 'LUNARA' in an elegant high-contrast serif with a small crescent-moon glyph over the A, solid single-color (soft charcoal) glyphs, crisp clean edges, high contrast, centered, no gradients, no photographic texture, 2400x700 PNG with alpha.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Flat, hard-edged, single-color text art so image_vectorize produces clean closed SVG paths; transparent alpha so it reads as the end-card wordmark and reuses on future covers. Text-bearing logo -> gemini-3-pro-image for legible letterforms.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat screen-print-style t-shirt graphic of a generic minimalist city skyline silhouette at dusk, but rendered with a smooth multi-stop gradient sky (orange to purple) behind the black skyline and a soft drop shadow -- clearly NOT separation-ready spot art, more like a photo-style poster. On a transparent background. Photoreal-ish blended tones, no hard flat color breaks.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): The 'trap' design: gradients + soft shadow = effectively unlimited tones, impossible on a 4-color manual press without halftone work; should draw a NO-GO / needs-reseparation verdict. gpt-image-2 for the blended gradient/shadow look.

defects.description: Design uses a smooth multi-stop orange-to-purple photographic gradient sky plus soft glow/drop shadow behind the skyline — effectively unlimited tones with no hard flat color breaks. This is NOT separation-ready spot art; it requires halftone/simulated-process work and cannot run on a 4-color manual press as-is. NO-GO / needs reseparation. (This is the intended 'trap' behavior, correctly present.)
Background is solid black, NOT transparent. The stated purpose requires a transparent background; the black field would print as a full-coverage flood, contaminating the separation.

results.requirement:
TASK: Restore one treasured, faded and scratched 1970s family keepsake scan -- correct the color cast and faded contrast, recover clarity/detail, conceal scratches over the plain backdrop -- and deliver a framed-A4 print-ready file (2480x3508 px, 300 DPI).
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): An authentic, heavily-aged HIGH-RESOLUTION flatbed scan of a mid-1970s color studio family snapshot: grandparents and a young girl (about six) posed together against a smooth, plain seamless CREAM/off-white studio backdrop. Strong overall warm yellow-orange color cast and faded, low-contrast tones typical of a decayed 1970s C-print dye; muted, washed-out skin tones and clothing colors. Period-correct 1970s hair, clothing and studio lighting. Several fine, bright white hairline SCRATCH lines of varying length and one short vertical crease run across the PLAIN cream backdrop area behind and beside the family (NOT across any face or figure). The whole frame is very slightly tilted (about 2-3 degrees) as if placed crooked on a scanner, with a thin ragged uneven white scan border down the left side and a faint dust speckle. Genuinely soft focus, low micro-contrast, real photographic film grain. Documentary realism, real pores and individual hair strands, no CGI gloss, no modern saturated color.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as a genuine decayed 1975 C-print scan: the warm/orange cast + flat faded contrast are the damage the chain must FIX, so do NOT pre-correct them. Render it at high pixel dimensions (a real flatbed print scan is large, e.g. >=2500x3600 px) so the final A4 crop_and_resize to 2480x3508 is a genuine downscale/re-frame, NEVER an upscale. The scratches and crease MUST sit over the PLAIN cream backdrop (a single near-uniform tone) and stay OFF the faces/figures, so select-by-prompt + a matched solid fill can honestly conceal them without any generative heal. Keep the slight tilt and ragged white scan border for the straighten+crop steps to act on. Keep it genuinely soft with native grain so the clarity steps have work to do and the later light-grain step blends the fill patch naturally. gpt-image-2 for photoreal aged-print realism.

Left eye behind the lens is mildly asymmetric/soft, consistent with period soft focus rather than a clear malformation.

panel.summary: Convincing decayed-1975 C-print scan with correct warm cast, faded contrast, off-backdrop scratches, tilt and ragged left border all intact and on-purpose; only faint hand-overlap softness in the lower center gives any pause.
This asset is flawless and perfectly executes the complex requirements for a period-correct, damaged source scan.
Flawless match to the damaged 1970s scan brief with no AI artifacts.

TASK: Turn SentinelMesh's raw screen recordings, product b-roll, logo, and brand color reference into a polished 90-120s AI-cybersecurity SaaS demo cut plus a 30s promo cutdown and 15s teaser (with a vertical social reframe), and build on-brand lower-third / call-out / graded end-card graphic plates and a vector logo as the editable-asset set for the Premiere handoff.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A cool, confident dark-mode brand color-reference photograph: a moody modern security-operations room, deep charcoal and teal tones, crisp white UI glow on monitors, soft controlled contrast, subtle film-like grain. Represents the calm, premium dark-mode look the whole piece should be graded toward.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Provides a believable cool/dark-mode target for the color-temperature and vibrance grade steps on the end-card; photoreal => gpt-image-2. Used as a match reference, not a deliverable.

TASK: Grade four raw deli photos to one cohesive gritty-warm look, cut the hero sandwich onto transparency, source a butcher-paper backdrop, vectorize the Deli & Dough wordmark, and bind all the prepped parts into the client's authored 2880x2304 Illustrator banner template to export a print-ready Uber Eats hero banner.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A warm, editorial real-estate interior look-reference photograph representing a premium brand grade: a sunlit modern-farmhouse living room at golden hour, airy warm whites, honeyed wood floors, deep-green accents, soft natural contrast, gentle warm highlights and clean shadows, subtle film-like grain. Photoreal, inviting, magazine-quality color. No text, no logo.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Provides a believable warm/golden target the color-temperature + vibrance grade steps aim the interior frame toward; photoreal => gpt-image-2. Used only as a grade match reference, not a deliverable.

results.requirement:
TASK: Cut six iPhone-shot graded trading-card / hobby-box photos out of their cluttered backgrounds, straighten and tone them, place each on a clean pure-white background, and export a consistent 2048x2048 square set (plus transparent PNG cutouts) named to match the store's Shopify product handles.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A shiny chrome-refractor basketball trading card sealed in a grading slab with a black label reading 'APEX  9.5' and four small subgrade numbers; the colourful refractor card is clearly visible and sharp, centered on a plain neutral surface. Shot like a real trading-card seller's clean phone photo for an online listing: the item is CENTERED, SHARP, well-lit under soft even daylight and fills most of the frame — clearly the subject. A plain, simple surface with only a hint of casual context (to be cut out later). Realistic and neat — NOT messy, NOT cluttered, NO random junk. Any grading label shows a FICTIONAL grading company, NEVER a real brand (no PSA, BGS, SGC, CGC). It is a REAL PHOTOGRAPH — not an illustration or 3D render.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Reflective refractor + busy background stress the subject-select and background-removal steps; consistent look target across the set.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Three graded trading-card slabs propped upright in a small clear acrylic display stand as a lot; all three cards are clearly visible and sharp, the group centered on a plain surface under soft daylight. results.requirement:
TASK: Take six already-shot raw overhead flat-lay apparel photos, straighten and color-true each, cut every garment cleanly off its cluttered surface, place them all onto one consistent flat mid-gray backdrop, and export a high-res + web-ready square marketplace pack.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal overhead flat-lay studio snapshot of a heather-gray men's crewneck t-shirt laid flat and neatly folded-open on a light wooden bench, shot from directly above. Slightly tilted (about 3 degrees off square), flat dull even lighting, slightly cool/blue white balance, a stray wooden clothespin and a tape measure at the edge of frame, soft shadow along one side. Real cotton knit texture, tiny lint, true documentary product-shot feel, no studio gloss. High resolution.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Deliberately imperfect (tilt, cool flat WB, cluttered wooden surface with props) so straighten + color-true + subject-select + bg-removal all have real work; gpt-image-2 for photoreal apparel. Shot at high resolution so the 3000 px marketplace crop is a downscale, never an upscale.

defects.description: Printed tape-measure numerals and tick marks are irregular and semi-legible; spacing between numbers is inconsistent and some glyphs are malformed, typical of AI-rendered measuring-tape markings.

The heather texture reads as a repetitive, slightly mushy noise pattern rather than true cotton knit; up close (bottom-left, top-right) it looks like a stamped/tiled fabric texture with faint mottled ghost-patterning instead of real knit stitch structure.
Wooden clothespin geometry is slightly off — the metal spring/pivot area and wood arm shaping look mildly fused and inconsistent, not a clean real spring clip.

panel.summary: Convincing photoreal raw flat-lay matching the brief, but the tape-measure numerals are garbled and the heather knit texture reads as a tiled AI noise pattern rather than genuine cotton knit.

defects.description: Provided preview appears only 1024×1024, so final marketplace high-resolution suitability cannot be verified from this asset view.
